# pdnd_eservices (Data Source)

Lists PDND e-services with optional filters by name, producer, technology, or state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pdnd_eservices" "rest_services" {
  technology = "REST"
}

output "rest_eservice_count" {
  value = length(data.pdnd_eservices.rest_services.eservices)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `mode` (String) Filter by mode (RECEIVE or DELIVER)
- `name` (String) Filter by e-service name
- `producer_ids` (List of String) Filter by producer UUIDs
- `technology` (String) Filter by technology (REST or SOAP)

### Read-Only

- `eservices` (Attributes List) List of e-services (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--eservices))

<a id="nestedatt--eservices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `eservices`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `is_client_access_delegable` (Boolean)
- `is_consumer_delegable` (Boolean)
- `is_signal_hub_enabled` (Boolean)
- `mode` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `personal_data` (Boolean)
- `producer_id` (String)
- `technology` (String)
- `template_id` (String)
